caption:
The cutest experience in London✨

At Love Dumplings Legend, you can enjoy a fun Baoby experience, where you can get an Original Baoby and also the new special: “Not a Horse Baoby” to celebrate the Year of the Horse 🧸🍜 (Original plushie key rings cost from £5.50 and the special from £9.50) While visiting Love Dumplings’ Legend, you can also enjoy delicious options such as dumplings, bao, signature milk tea, matcha, and more 😊

📆Every Saturday @love_dumplingslegend 

🗺️🔗 Link to the London map with the best spots to visit and the latest promo codes🎁-saved in bio

📍 Love Dumplings‘ Legend, 28 Chancery Lane
